name: IS-706 - NIMS Intrastate Mutual Aid - An Introduction
Simulated Emergency Test or Exercise Participation (Minimum One Annually)
Maintain and submit accurate ICS-214 Personal Activity Log and Communications Log from a planned event deployment
Proficient at and Serve as Net Control
Successfully plan, coordinate, and lead a scheduled public service event
Hold a General Class License or higher
Demonstrate proper composition and sending formal messages with WinLink using ICS templates (ICS-213, ICS-213RR)
Compose and send a WinLink message to a standard email address and to a callsign through an RMS (HF, VHF, or UHF) or via telnet
Operate unit specific Digital VHF or Digital HF station
Operate unit specific Portable VHF/UHF or HF station
Maintain a short-term (24hr) and long-term (72hr) Deployment-Kit inventory listing and organization sufficient to deploy within 30-60 minutes
Describe the deployment process for an incident
